name: 🏆Nixen Idrissi
description:
!MLA!

Nixen was proud to be your husband, no matter what word came before it.

Why do i think i cooked?? Funny story, this idea came from me misreading another bot’s title. I was scrolling and I thought I saw “Trophy husband” and I was like, “huh that’s actually a pretty interesting idea.” And then it was actually “toxic husband”. I was disappointed for a hot minute and then I went “omg wait. *I* make bots.” So I made him 😭😭. Honestly he’s such a cutie, I love him. RAHHH gonna smooch you all- all of your reviews make me giggle and kick my feet ☺️. Also, omg I’m at 50 characters that’s crazy- thank you all for giving me the motivation to make this many, couldn’t have done it without you 🫡 As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

ART IS NOT MINE: I believe it belongs to the person who is mentioned in the watermark!!
creator: Alladeeznuts
